home.heroTagline1: Draft, refine, and deliver your speech with confidence.
home.heroTagline2: Give the warmest and most personal present.
home.previewAnyoneCanEdit: Anyone with the link can edit
home.step1Description: Speeches are better with friends. Bring your inner circle together to share stories, fact-check memories, and brainstorm ideas.
home.step2Description: It's not just about writing alone. Get and bundle input, precise feedback, and suggestions from your team to shape the perfect narrative.
home.step2Quote: "Remember that time at the lake house? We should include that here."
home.step3Description: Usually, the speech is a surprise present. The receiver doesn't know what's coming. We help you find a venue that matches the moment—whether it's an intimate dinner or a grand hall.
home.step4Description: Make it official. Send a secret "Golden Ticket" to the guest of honor, and "Silver Tickets" to all your attendees. Coordinate the date, location, and dress code in style.
home.ctaDescription: Join your fellow speech-givers who turned anxiety into applause. Start your draft today.

onboarding.heading: Let's Get Started
onboarding.subheading: Create your speech project in {steps} simple steps.
onboarding.speechTypeDescription: This helps us ask the right questions.
onboarding.speechTypeGiftDesc: You are organizing the event or surprise for someone.
onboarding.speechTypeOccasionDesc: The location/time is set by someone else.
onboarding.occasionWeddingDesc: Best Man, Maid of Honor, Parent...
onboarding.dateDescription: We'll help you track your progress.
onboarding.dateUnknownDesc: I will decide later (date picker available)
onboarding.contextDescription: This information is used for invitations and questions.
onboarding.contextHonoreeHint: This will be used in questions like "Share your best anecdote about {name}"
onboarding.contextHonoreeHintFallback: This will be used in questions like "Share your best anecdote about them"
onboarding.errorCreating: Something went wrong while creating your project

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue writing.
login.resetSuccess: Password reset successful! Please sign in with your new password.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.checkEmailDescription: We've sent password reset instructions to {email}
forgotPassword.checkEmailBody: Click the link in the email to reset your password. The link will expire in 1 hour.
forgotPassword.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
verifyEmail.errorCodeExpired: Code has expired. Please resend a new code.

resetPassword.title: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: This password reset link is invalid or has expired
resetPassword.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.

changeEmail.title: Change Email Address
changeEmail.successDescription: Your email has been updated to {email}

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account preferences.
settings.dangerDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmItem3: All guests and submissions for your projects

feedback.step1Description: Toast is brand new and we want to build something people actually love. This takes about 2 minutes.
feedback.step1Body: We just launched Toast — a tool to help people write better speeches together. We want to know what you think, and whether this is something worth building further.
feedback.step2Description: Be honest — what does Toast do well, and what feels off?
feedback.step2Placeholder: e.g. I liked the editor but wasn't sure how collaborators fit in...
feedback.step3Title: How likely are you to use Toast?
feedback.step3Description: For a real upcoming speech or event.
feedback.likelihoodVeryLikelyDesc: I already have a speech in mind
feedback.step4Description: Honest answers help us figure out if this is viable.
feedback.pay5Desc: If it saves me real time
feedback.pay10Desc: If it helps me write a great speech
feedback.pay15plusDesc: If it does most of the work for me
feedback.step5Title: What would make Toast a must-have?
feedback.step5Description: Optional — but we read every response.
feedback.step5Placeholder: e.g. AI suggestions, better mobile support, a teleprompter mode...
feedback.errorSubmitting: Something went wrong. Please try again.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Manage the basic details of your speech.

progress.title: Progress
progress.stepSetupDesc: Fill in the speech title, occasion type, event date, and who the speech is for.
progress.stepCollaboratorsDesc: Add friends, family, or colleagues who can contribute stories and memories.
progress.stepEventDateDesc: Set the date of the occasion so you can track how much time you have left.
progress.stepQuestionnaireDesc: Write the questions your collaborators will answer, then share the link with them.
progress.stepSubmissionsDesc: Wait for collaborators to submit their answers through the questionnaire link.
progress.stepDraftDesc: Use the collected stories and memories to draft your speech in the editor.
progress.stepSchedulingDesc: Propose date options and let collaborators vote on the best time.
progress.stepLocationDesc: Choose or confirm the venue for the event.
progress.stepInvitesDesc: Send personalised invitations to all your guests for the event.

collaborators.title: Team
